description: §12.3/§12.5 — a server function with a non-JSON-serializable PARAMETER type (`fn()`) fires E-ROUTE-004 (error). Arguments cross the client→server network boundary as JSON; a function value cannot be transmitted.
rationale: §12.5 wire-serializability gate (param direction): a `server function` param whose resolved type is a non-serializable kind (function/markup/snippet/cssClass/engine/state) cannot be JSON-encoded across the §12.3 boundary, so E-ROUTE-004 fires as a hard error. The offending param name + kind are named in the message (impl freedom).
